title: lolium temulentum f. muticum
intro:
Lolium temulentum f. muticum, also known as bearded darnel or muticus darnel, is a variant of the Lolium temulentum plant, a type of grass that contains psychoactive compounds.

The medicinal properties of Lolium temulentum f. muticum include its ability to induce sedation, relaxation, and reduced anxiety due to its alkaloid content, particularly lysergic acid amide.

The health benefits of this plant are not extensively documented, but it has been reported to have potential therapeutic effects in treating insomnia, anxiety disorders, and certain mental health conditions.

Herbal preparations of Lolium temulentum f. muticum are not commonly used in modern medicine, but in traditional contexts, it has been used in the form of teas, infusions, or extracts to induce relaxation and reduce stress.
